subcodes.first_line: O thou who art sore-afflicted in the path of Truth! I know not in what tongue or utterance to recount the tribulations of that Wronged One. In truth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مبتلای سبیل حق نمیدانم بچه زبان و بیان بلایای آنمظلومرا نمایم فی الحقیقه
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @martyrs and martyrdom, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @consolation and comfort, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
